title: DeathCompass
description: Automatically receive a compass on respawn that points exactly to your last death location.
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

A simple quality-of-life mod that gives players a clear and fair way to recover their items. When you respawn, you are automatically given a Death Compass that points exactly to your last death location, reducing frustration without feeling like a cheat.

Lightweight and multiplayer-friendly. Fully compatible with singleplayer.

**What it does:**
- Automatically places a Death Compass in your inventory the moment you respawn.
- Tracks your exact death coordinates to guide you straight back to your lost loot.
- Uses familiar vanilla compass mechanics to point toward your recovery spot.
- Spins randomly if you are in a different dimension than where you died, just like standard compasses.

**Configuration:**
This mod works straight out of the box with zero configuration required. Just install it, and it will handle everything automatically whenever a player dies!

**Details:**
Designed to keep survival gameplay fair while eliminating the need to constantly write down coordinates.

Fully translated into 10 languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese, Korean, and Italian.

Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord: https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE
